assumptions.groups_supported: Unique group names counted once from the private source export before names are removed from public files.
assumptions.public_map_entries: Rows/order entries in the public source export. This can be higher than unique groups because some groups order more than once.
assumptions.returning_group_entries: Difference between public map/order entries and unique groups supported.
assumptions.young_people_reached: Placeholder estimate using one kit per young person. Adjust if your public reporting uses a different assumption.
assumptions.map_counts: Map popups use postcode-district aggregates and kit bands, not exact per-district order rows or names.
